docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-11-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF RICHARD CARPENETI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,457.55 FILED BY CARPENETI, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-07-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE PROOF OF SERVICE
